headlines.headline: Why Stephen A. says NBA's 65-game rule should remain in place
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith gives his perspective on why the NBA should not get rid of the 65-game rule.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. still has concerns over Knicks despite 7-game win streak
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith cites the lingering presence of the Pistons as to why he can't get too carried away with the Knicks' recent purple patch.

headlines.headline: NBA expansion: Seattle, Las Vegas, draft format, news, updates
headlines.description: The NBA seems closer than ever to adding two franchises. Here's what we know, including how an expansion draft could work.

headlines.headline: NBA owners vote to explore Vegas, Seattle expansion bids
headlines.description: The NBA's board of governors has approved a vote for the league to explore bids and applicants for expansion teams exclusively in Las Vegas and Seattle.

headlines.headline: NBA Power Rankings: The Thunder reign while East teams rise
headlines.description: Where our NBA insiders ranked all 30 teams as the regular season reaches the home stretch.

headlines.headline: Bengals' Joe Flacco says teams 'dumb' for not signing him to start
headlines.description: Joe Flacco is back with the Bengals as Joe Burrow's backup, but he isn't shy about voicing his belief that teams made a mistake by passing on him to be their starting quarterback.

headlines.headline: NFL draft: Ranking Ohio State first-round WRs since 2022

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency class rankings: Most improved rosters
headlines.description: How did all 32 NFL teams fare in March, taking into account free agent signings, trades, extensions and departures? We stacked each class.

headlines.headline: How changes to coaching staff will impact the Packers
headlines.description: The offense brings back a familiar face in Luke Getsy, while Jonathan Gannon appears set to bring a 3-4 base.

headlines.headline: Carter Yakemchuk scores in NHL debut as streaking Senators top Red Wings, 3-2
headlines.description: — Carter Yakemchuk scored a second-period goal and also had an assist in his NHL debut as the streaking Ottawa Senators edged the Detroit Red Wings 3-2 on Tuesday night.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff watch: Projecting the Sabres' first-round opponent
headlines.description: Wednesday's matchup against Boston could be repeated in April. Plus, updated playoff projections after Tuesday's massive slate.
